## utm-dev cleanup all

Remove ALL SDKs and cache (DESTRUCTIVE)

### Synopsis

WARNING: This will remove ALL installed SDKs and cache files. This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone.

```
utm-dev cleanup all [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for all
```
